w:r.w:t: READ THIS DOCUMENT IN FULL BEFORE WRITING A SINGLE LINE OF CODE
SECTION 0 — HOW TO USE THIS BRIEF

This document is a machine-first implementation brief. It is structured to prevent hallucination, interpolation, and creative deviation. Every section has an explicit checklist. If your output does not match a checklist item, you have made an error. Correct it before proceeding.
DO NOT invent values not listed here. If a value is not specified, use the closest value from the design tokens in Section 1.
DO NOT use placeholder images from Unsplash or any external image CDN on the services section.
DO NOT change any font family. The fonts are specified exactly in Section 1.
DO NOT change any hex colour. Exact hex values are in Section 1.
DO NOT add new sections, cards, or UI elements not described here.
After building, re-read each checklist. Tick every item mentally. If one fails, fix it.
SECTION 1 — DESIGN TOKENS (EXACT VALUES, NO DEVIATION)
These are the only permitted values. Using any other value is an error.
#800020 | Use: Accent rule lines, icon backgrounds, footer bar
#0F172A | Use: Primary text, logo text, dark panels
#F8FAFC | Use: Tile backgrounds on back face
Do NOT use any colour not in this list
Do NOT use any other font family
ALL spacing must be a multiple of 8px. No exceptions.
36px — this is the MINIMUM distance any element sits from the card edge
Do NOT use arbitrary pixel values like 50px, 43px, 12px, 15px
3.5 inches wide × 2.1 inches tall (standard business card)
2 — FRONT (top) and BACK (bottom), stacked vertically on page
Embedded <style> block — NO external CSS files
Logo from Cloudinary (URL provided in Section 4). No other external images.
Pure CSS only — subtle SVG data URI or CSS gradient. NO Unsplash photos.
Rendered using a pure CSS/SVG QR pattern OR a third-party JS QR library (e.g. qrcode.js CDN). Links to: https://www.autogaard.com
Lucide SVG icons only — loaded via lucide.createIcons()
@media print block: remove body background, remove box-shadow, add border: 1px solid #eee
The front face has exactly 3 vertical zones:
Logo (left-aligned) + QR Code (right-aligned). Sits at top with 36px margin from top and sides.
Name + Title. Anchored to bottom-left. 36px from bottom of content area (above footer).
Full-width dark bar at very bottom of card. Contains tagline text.
Left-aligned, top-left corner of Zone A
Use qrcode.js library OR a pure CSS/SVG approximation
border: 1.5px solid var(--onyx), border-radius: 6px, padding: 5px, background: white
Right-aligned, same vertical baseline as logo
Outfit, weight 800, size 38px, color: var(--onyx), letter-spacing: -1.5px
A 2px horizontal rule, color: var(--burgundy), width: 40px, margin: 8px 0
Inter, weight 600, size: 11px, color: var(--slate), text-transform: uppercase, letter-spacing: 4px
Bottom-left of content area, 36px from left edge, 16px above footer bar
DO NOT colour the title text in burgundy. The title uses --slate. Only the separator rule uses --burgundy.
var(--onyx) — full width, flush to card bottom
Smart Car Acquisition · AI Diagnostics · Contactless Management
Inter, weight 500, size 9px, color: white, letter-spacing: 1.5px, text-transform: uppercase
Use a centered dot · (U+00B7) between each phrase, color: var(--burgundy)
A very subtle diagonal line pattern using CSS repeating-linear-gradient
texture sits behind all content at z-index: 1, content at z-index: 10
The back face has exactly 3 vertical zones:
'OUR PREMIUM SERVICES' label with extending rule line
4 icon tiles in a single row
Outfit, weight 800, size 11px, color: var(--onyx), letter-spacing: 2px, text-transform: uppercase
A thin horizontal rule extending to the right edge of the card content area
Use flexbox: label left, rule flex-grows to fill remaining space. gap: 12px
4 tiles in a CSS grid with equal columns. NO PHOTOS. Icons only.
display: flex, flex-direction: column, align-items: center, gap: 10px
width: 40px, height: 40px, background: var(--surface) = #F8FAFC, border-radius: 10px, display: flex, align-items: center, justify-content: center
data-lucide icon at width: 18px, color: var(--onyx)
Inter, weight 700, size: 9px, color: var(--slate), text-align: center, line-height: 1.3
Slot 4 (AI Contactless) has opacity: 0.55 to signal 'coming soon'
Two-column flex row. Left: contact list. Right: address block.
width: 26px, height: 26px, background: var(--burgundy), border-radius: 50%, display: flex, align-items: center, justify-content: center
Icon: data-lucide="mail" | Label: EMAIL | Value: sav-dev@autogaard.com
Icon: data-lucide="globe" | Label: WEBSITE | Value: www.autogaard.com
text-align: right, display: flex, flex-direction: column, align-items: flex-end, gap: 6px
data-lucide="map-pin", width: 14px, color: var(--burgundy). Aligned right.
Inter, weight 500, size: 10px, color: var(--slate), line-height: 1.5
The address block must have a visible left border in var(--burgundy) — 2px solid. This is the ONLY use of burgundy as a border element.
Use CSS custom properties (variables) for ALL colour references. Never hardcode a hex in a property.
The :root block must define all 6 tokens: --burgundy, --onyx, --slate, --white, --surface, --rule
Use calc() for all scaled card dimensions: calc(var(--card-width) * var(--scale))
Both cards share the .card class for shared styles (border-radius, box-shadow, overflow: hidden)
Use separate classes .front-content and .back-content for face-specific padding
content-layer must be position: relative, z-index: 10, width: 100%, height: 100%, display: flex, flex-direction: column, box-sizing: border-box
All padding on .front-content and .back-content: 36px — ALL FOUR SIDES EQUAL
DO NOT use padding: 50px anywhere. The approved padding is 36px.
DO NOT use margin values that are not multiples of 8.
Go through every item below. If any item is not satisfied, fix it before outputting your result.
[ ] Output is a single self-contained HTML file with no external CSS or JS files (only CDN links in <head>)
[ ] Lucide icons CDN link is present in <head>: https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest
[ ] Google Fonts link is present in <head> for Outfit and Inter
[ ] lucide.createIcons() is called at bottom of <body>
[ ] No hardcoded hex values appear outside :root
[ ] Page layout is flex column, items centered, gap: 60px, padding: 40px
[ ] Card width is calc(3.5in * 1.8), height is calc(2.1in * 1.8)
[ ] Front padding is exactly 36px on all sides
[ ] Logo src points to Cloudinary URL exactly as specified in Section 3.2
[ ] Logo height is 48px, width is auto
[ ] QR code is present, links to https://www.autogaard.com, size 72px × 72px
[ ] QR container has border: 1.5px solid var(--onyx), border-radius: 6px
[ ] Name font is Outfit weight 800, size 38px
[ ] A 2px horizontal burgundy rule sits BETWEEN name and title
[ ] Title text is 'Founder' — NOT 'Principal Design Engineer'
[ ] Title is Inter weight 600, uppercase, letter-spacing 4px, color var(--slate)
[ ] Title color is var(--slate) #375784 — NOT burgundy, NOT onyx
[ ] Tagline reads: 'Smart Car Acquisition · AI Diagnostics · Contactless Management'
[ ] Dot separators in tagline are colored var(--burgundy)
[ ] Background texture is CSS-only (no Unsplash, no image URLs in background)
[ ] Back padding is exactly 36px on all sides
[ ] Section header text is 'OUR PREMIUM SERVICES'
[ ] Section header has an extending rule line to the right
[ ] NO photo images in the services grid — icons only
[ ] Service 4: cpu icon, label 'AI Contactless (Coming Soon)', opacity 0.55
[ ] Each service tile has a square icon container on var(--surface) background
[ ] Contact footer uses flexbox row: contact list left, address right
[ ] Two contact rows: Email (mail icon) and Website (globe icon)
[ ] Icon circles are var(--burgundy) background, 26px diameter
[ ] Address block has border-left: 2px solid var(--burgundy)
[ ] Only Outfit and Inter are used — no system fonts, no other Google Fonts
[ ] Maximum 3 font sizes per card face
[ ] Every padding and margin value is a multiple of 8
[ ] No element is closer than 36px to card edge
[ ] No arbitrary values like 50px, 43px, 12px, 15px appear in the CSS
[ ] Burgundy (#800020) appears in: footer bar, separator rule, icon circle backgrounds, dot separators, address left-border
[ ] Burgundy does NOT appear as body text colour anywhere
[ ] Onyx (#0F172A) appears in: primary text, QR border, footer bar background
[ ] Slate (#375784) appears in: subtitle/title, labels, secondary text, address
SECTION 7 — KNOWN HALLUCINATION ERRORS TO AVOID
These are the most common AI mistakes on this type of task. Check each one explicitly.
Coloring the title text in burgundy
Title uses var(--slate) #375784. Burgundy only on the rule separator.
Using Unsplash photos in service tiles
Services use Lucide icons only. Zero photos on back face.
Forgetting the burgundy rule between name and title
A 2px solid burgundy horizontal line must sit between name and title.
Not implementing a real QR code
Use qrcode.js or a CSS/SVG QR. A fake dotted square is not acceptable.
Using arbitrary spacing not on the 8pt grid
Every margin/padding is a multiple of 8px.
Hardcoding hex values in CSS rules
All colours go in :root. Reference only via var(--name).
Background is CSS texture only. No external image URLs on cards.
Tagline is exactly: Smart Car Acquisition · AI Diagnostics · Contactless Management
Missing the left-border on the address block
border-left: 2px solid var(--burgundy) on address container.
SECTION 8 — SUGGESTED PROMPT TO SEND TO THE AI
Copy the following prompt verbatim when submitting this brief:

You are implementing a business card HTML file. You have been given a complete design brief. Read it in full before writing any code. After writing the code, run through the implementation checklist in Section 6 line by line. If any item fails, fix it before outputting. Output a single self-contained HTML file. No placeholders. No explanations. Just the complete, working HTML.
END OF BRIEF — ALL SECTIONS COMPLETE
